criteria.name: AI-Powered Enhancement
criteria.description: Ability to automatically improve image and video quality using AI algorithms (e.g., unblurring, denoising, color correction, upscaling).

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface for both beginners and professionals.

criteria.name: Versatility
criteria.description: Range of AI-powered tools and features offered, including object removal, background replacement, artistic filters, and avatar creation.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on multiple platforms such as iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS.

criteria.name: Pricing and Free Access
criteria.description: Availability of a free version or trial, and the cost and limitations of premium features.
